summary: Enhanced Buildings Module - All backend tests (12/12) and frontend tests passed. Building types API, single building creation, bulk creation, edit, and delete all working correctly.

issues: Existing buildings (E01, E02) show 0/0/0 parking and 0 floors/units - likely older schema without enhanced fields

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/buildings/types - Returns 4 building types with correct config
Backend: POST /api/buildings - Creates residential tower with enhanced fields
Backend: POST /api/buildings - Creates mixed tower with commercial floors
Backend: POST /api/buildings - Creates row house (single unit)
Backend: POST /api/buildings - Creates bungalow (single unit)
Backend: POST /api/buildings/bulk - Creates multiple buildings with same config
Backend: PUT /api/buildings/{id} - Updates building with enhanced fields
Backend: DELETE /api/buildings/{id} - Deletes building
Backend: GET /api/buildings - Returns buildings with all display fields
Frontend: Buildings page loads with correct table headers
Frontend: Add Building dialog shows all enhanced fields (type, parking, floors, apartments)
Frontend: Building type selector shows 4 types
Frontend: Parking configuration fields (Basement, Stilt/Ground, Upper Level) work
Frontend: Floor configuration fields (Residential, Commercial, Apartments per Floor) work
Frontend: Building creation shows success toast and updates table
Frontend: Bulk Add dialog allows multiple building names
Frontend: Edit dialog pre-fills existing building data
Frontend: Delete removes building and shows confirmation
Frontend: Table displays Parking as B/S/U format
Frontend: Table displays calculated Units correctly (floors * apartments)
test_credentials: Dynamic test users created per test run
seed_data_creation: Test buildings created: TEST_Tower_A, TEST_Mixed_Tower, TEST_Row_House_1, TEST_Bungalow_1, BULK_Wing_A, BULK_Wing_B, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Buildings module fully tested. All 4 building types work: residential_tower, mixed_tower, row_house, bungalow. Bulk creation tested. Edit/delete tested. Existing buildings E01, E02 have old schema (0 values for new fields) but still display correctly.

building_types_api.details: Returns 4 types: residential_tower, mixed_tower, row_house, bungalow with correct has_commercial, has_apartments_per_floor, is_single_unit flags

single_building_creation.details: Creates buildings with building_type, parking_basement/stilt/upper, commercial_floors, residential_floors, apartments_per_floor. Auto-calculates total_parking_floors, floors, units.

bulk_building_creation.details: Creates multiple buildings with same template. Returns created count and list of building IDs.

building_update.details: Updates all enhanced fields and recalculates totals.

building_delete.details: Deletes building and returns 404 on subsequent GET.

table_display.details: All columns display correctly. Parking shows in B/S/U format (e.g., 2/0/0). Mixed tower shows floors as 3C + 8R format.
